channel.title: Behavioral-Economics on Clear Signals
channel.description: Recent content in Behavioral-Economics on Clear Signals

item.title: Why the Smartest People Make the Worst Financial Decisions
item.description: There is a comforting assumption most people carry around: the smarter you are, the better your decisions. It makes intuitive sense. If you can solve complex problems, analyze data, and think abstractly, surely you can navigate personal finance better than someone who cannot.
